headline: SpaceX Options Launch After $1.765 Trillion IPO Valuation
summary: SpaceX options begin trading Tuesday after shares opened at $150, above the $135 IPO price.

headline: NYSE Content Update: Stocks Rally, ICE Brent Crude Drops to $82 on Iran Deal
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.

headline: OKX's Haider Rafique on trading pre-IPO perpetuals
summary: Haider Rafique, global managing partner at OKX, joins CNBC's 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss how perpetual futures work, the potential to predict IPO-day moves, and more.

raw.headline: OKX's Haider Rafique on trading pre-IPO perpetuals

headline: Trading Technologies and ICE Data Services Reach Agreement for ICE Market Data and Reference Data to Power New TT® Fixed Income EMS
summary: Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a global capital markets technology platform services provider, announced today that it has entered into an agreement with ICE Data Services, which is part of Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), to use its foundational evaluated prices and reference data in TT's new buy-side Fixed Income execution management system (EMS). Additionally, TT will offer ICE's "Continuously Evaluated Price" (CEP) market data feed to TT clients.

raw.headline: Trading Technologies and ICE Data Services Reach Agreement for ICE Market Data and Reference Data to Power New TT® Fixed Income EMS

Additionally, TT will offer ICE's "Continuously Evaluated Price" (CEP) market data feed to TT clients.

headline: Kalshi's Record $18B Month Was Powered By A Secret AI Named 'Harrison' That Runs On Claude
summary: Kalshi quietly built a custom AI named 'Harrison' on Anthropic's Claude to referee its prediction markets and power a record-breaking $18 billion month.
